APP_DESCRIPTION: The platform of the European Commission for Islamic Centers is the easiest and ideal solution to deliver the donor to the needy in various regions through a safe and transparent donation process.
PROJECT_DESCRIPTION: Choose the appropriate project to donate to and that suits you
MONEY_DESCRIPTION: Choose the amount you want to donate
PAYMENT_METHODS_DESCRIPTION: Choose the appropriate payment method for you to donate
PROJECTS_HEADER_DESCRIPTION: Various donation opportunities that create a sustainable impact and achieve a wide social impact for the neediest cases.
ORGANISATION_NAME: European Organization of the Islamic Centers
NAME: Name
ORGANISATION_DESCRIPTION: It is an Organization specialized within caring of the Islamic Centers affairs in Europe. Through the initiative of some imminent religious personalities from Europe, the Organization was established in accordance with the Article 60 and all what follows from the Swiss Civil Code, related to the establishment of associations. It is an independent and nongovernmental voluntary charitable association that leads to work according to a clear vision and previously established aims and steps, and declared means.
VISION_DESCRIPTION: Excellence in serving Islamic centers to upgrade them and develop their performance.
MESSAGE_DESCRIPTION: Elevating the role of Islamic centers in Europe, developing their means, and expanding their scope of work to respond to the needs and aspirations of European Muslims, and to play a leading role within European civil society institutions.
GOAL_DESCRIPTION: Caring for Islamic centers and accompanying them for development and growth.
ABOUT_US_DESC: A trusted digital donation platform, accredited by the European Organization of Islamic Centers. It enables you to support humanitarian projects and causes securely and transparently, ensuring your donations reach those who need them.
HERO_TITLE: Mercy... giving that reaches <br class="d-none d-md-block"> and makes a difference
FAQ_DESC: Answers to the most common questions about the Rahma platform and donations
FAQ_A1: A trusted digital donation platform, accredited by the European Organization of Islamic Centers. It enables you to support humanitarian projects and causes securely and transparently, ensuring your donations reach those who need them.
FAQ_Q2: Are donations through the Rahma platform secure?
FAQ_A2: Yes, all donations are made through secure and certified payment gateways, and data is encrypted to protect donor information.
FAQ_Q3: How are the displayed campaigns selected?
FAQ_A3: All campaigns are subject to rigorous review to ensure transparency and credibility before being published on the platform.
FAQ_Q4: Can I donate repeatedly every month?
FAQ_A4: Yes, you can choose monthly donation to support campaigns continuously.
FAQ_Q5: How do I know that my donation has reached its recipients?
FAQ_A5: We publish periodic reports on the impact of campaigns and the total amounts spent to ensure full transparency.
BROWSE_CAMPAIGNS_DESC: Choose the campaign you wish to support and contribute to making an impact
DONATION_RECEIVED_SUCCESS: Your donation has been received successfully
SUCCESS_QUOTE: Your donation today is not just an amount... but a hope that reaches those who need it.
APPROVED_BY_EOIC: Approved by the European Organisation of Islamic Centers (EOIC)
